title: Exciting developments under way at Heiderand Mall
description: BUSINESS NEWS - Heiderand Mall is pleased to...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"Advertorial","html":"Advertorial"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"BUSINESS NEWS - Heiderand Mall is pleased to announce the commencement of a significant development project designed to elevate and enhance the overall customer experience at the centre.","html":"BUSINESS NEWS - Heiderand Mall is pleased to announce the commencement of a significant development project designed to elevate and enhance the overall customer experience at the centre."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"As part of the preparations for a major expansion, scheduled to commence in early 2026, we have initiated the construction of a new under-roof parking facility."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"This marks the first phase in our long-term vision to enhance customer experience and value. The development will intro-duce additional retail space, as well as the relocation and expansion of the existing retailers.","html":"This marks the first phase in our long-term vision to enhance customer experience and value. The development will intro-duce additional retail space, as well as the relocation and expansion of the existing retailers."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"This is an exciting new chapter for Heiderand Mall, and we are committed to delivering the quality, variety and comfort our shoppers deserve.","html":"This is an exciting new chapter for Heiderand Mall, and we are committed to delivering the quality, variety and comfort our shoppers deserve."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"While construction is under way, there may be some temporary disruptions. We sincerely apologise for any inconvenience this may cause and assure our customers that every effort is being made to minimise the impact during this period.","html":"While construction is under way, there may be some temporary disruptions. We sincerely apologise for any inconvenience this may cause and assure our customers that every effort is being made to minimise the impact during this period."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Effective 28 July, the parking area behind the filling station will be closed for enabling works until further notice. Once construction commences, the closure of the entrance to the centre behind the filling station, together with an internal road closure, will also be required.","html":"Effective 28 July, the parking area behind the filling station will be closed for enabling works until further notice. Once construction commences, the closure of the entrance to the centre behind the filling station, together with an internal road closure, will also be required."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The rest of the entrances to the centre will, however, remain open for the duration of the first phase.","html":"The rest of the entrances to the centre will, however, remain open for the duration of the first phase."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"A temporary closure of the entrance from the traffic circle on Melkhout Street will be required in future.","html":"A temporary closure of the entrance from the traffic circle on Melkhout Street will be required in future."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"We thank you for your continued support and patience, and look forward to welcoming you to a new and improved shopping destination in the near future.","html":"We thank you for your continued support and patience, and look forward to welcoming you to a new and improved shopping destination in the near future."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]

images.alt: Exciting developments under way at Heiderand Mall
